h1.visual_description: Large, bold, dark blue sans-serif font, primary page title.
h1.example_text: Key Functions by Main Service Flow

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, purple sans-serif font, positioned as a section or context header above the main title.
h2.example_text: Introduction of product services and key features

visual_matchers.pattern: Numbered list items (e.g., 1., 2.) in the first column of a table
Bold text in the second column of the table
Light blue background fill for table row

markdown_grammar.table_style: html (required for merged cells in the 'Service Stage' column)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Company logo 'Upstage' in the bottom right corner; faint page number (e.g., '3') centered within the content area.
